quote.msg:
是咁的人係歐洲留學
一路keep住搵intern
而家好好彩同一時間出左幾個semester intern offer
1. 二線頭既行
Wholesale banking trade finance support
Operation work 多 但贏在穩定同hea hea 地

2. 三線行 CIB coverage
做pitch book, ECM 之類 IBD coverage
但收收地皮 早排瀨曬野成個global sector摺左
而家淨係做Pan European companies

3. Fortune 500 Real Estate Strategy
Data analytics (heavily programming driven)

大家會點睇
Background: finance master
之前有d Corp Bank experience
另外有份 蚊型ibank S&T final in 緊
個人偏好第二份似開到最多眼界
不過rerun offer 機會就最低因為間公司極速縮緊水
但第一份就最易有rerun offer, 第三份就最好玩

呢邊見工好hea
grad job先要apt test 果d
Intern 直接 HR -> manager -> director in
我自己用ibank resume template + track 住LinkedIn
通常個job 一post 上網一日內就報
每份resume都用software 執d keywords
我份cover letter 3 段
頭一段同尾一段永遠一樣
中間果段就睇佢地公司annual report 同search 你個position 條team 個development/ strategy 黎寫
